items.definition_en: A bill for services like electricity, water, or gas.
items.example_en: My utility bill was higher this month.

items.definition_en: The amount you pay to cover your credit card debt.
items.example_en: I made my monthly credit card payment today.

items.definition_en: An initial payment for something expensive, like a house or car.
items.example_en: They saved up for a down payment on their new house.

items.definition_en: A regular charge for keeping something in good condition.
items.example_en: There is a maintenance fee for living in the apartment complex.

items.definition_en: The money paid for instruction at a school or university.
items.example_en: She took out a loan to pay her college tuition.

items.definition_en: A charge when you spend more money than you have in your bank account.
items.example_en: He was charged an overdraft fee after buying groceries.

items.definition_en: Money you pay for missing a payment deadline.
items.example_en: A late fee was added to my credit card bill.

items.definition_en: The money you pay to join an organization or club.
items.example_en: There is an annual membership fee for the gym.

items.definition_en: An extra amount added to a bill for a service.
items.example_en: A service charge is included in the restaurant bill.

items.definition_en: A charge for taking money out of your account.
items.example_en: ATM withdrawals may come with a withdrawal fee.

items.definition_en: Money you pay when you cancel a service or booking.
items.example_en: They had to pay a cancellation fee for their flight.

items.definition_en: A regular payment for continuous access to a service.
items.example_en: She bought a monthly subscription to a music app.

items.definition_en: A charge for a provided service, often in banking or hotels.
items.example_en: The hotel bill included a service fee.

items.definition_en: A regular payment to pay off a loan for a house.
items.example_en: Their mortgage payment is due at the start of each month.

items.definition_en: Money spent on looking after children.
items.example_en: Childcare costs can be a big part of the monthly budget.

items.definition_en: A charge you pay for using something rented, like a car.
items.example_en: The leasing fee for the car is paid every month.

items.definition_en: A charge made for carrying out a financial action.
items.example_en: Online banks may charge a small transaction fee.

items.definition_en: Money charged for the processing of documents or services.
items.example_en: An administration fee was added to the total cost.

items.definition_en: A fee for processing an order or request.
items.example_en: There's a handling fee when you buy tickets online.

items.definition_en: A regular payment for ongoing use of a particular service.
items.example_en: My streaming service subscription renews every month.
